title: 10 best herbal capsules for oily face
intro_desc: Herbal capsules for oily face are a natural and effective solution to combat excessive oil production, clogged pores, and acne-prone skin. These capsules contain a blend of herbs that help to balance the skin's natural oil production, reduce inflammation, and purify the pores. Examples of herbal capsules that help with oily face include tea tree, lavender, and chamomile extracts, which work together to control sebum production and soothe the skin. By taking these capsules regularly, individuals can say goodbye to greasy faces and hello to a clearer, more radiant complexion, improving their overall self-confidence and daily lives.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Sage capsules helps with oily face because they contain antioxidants and anti-inflammatory properties that help to balance the skin's natural oil production. The capsules also contain salvestrols, which have been shown to reduce sebum secretion and regulate oil glands. Additionally, sage has astringent properties that can help to tighten pores and reduce the appearance of acne and blackheads. By taking sage capsules regularly, individuals with oily skin may experience a reduction in shine and an improvement in overall complexion.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant Properties: Herbal sage capsules contain antioxidants that help reduce inflammation and free radical damage in the skin, which can contribute to oil production and acne.
Astringent Properties: Sage has astringent properties that help tighten pores, reducing the appearance of pores and minimizing sebum production, leading to a more balanced skin tone.
Antibacterial Properties: The antibacterial compounds in sage capsules can help reduce bacterial growth on the skin, which is often associated with acne and oily skin.
remedy_parts: Roots: Sage roots have anti-inflammatory properties that help to reduce redness and swelling associated with acne-prone skin.
Stems: Sage stems contain flavonoids that can help to regulate sebum production, reducing excess oiliness on the face.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Rosemary capsules helps with oily face because they contain antioxidants that help to reduce inflammation and prevent clogged pores, thereby controlling sebum production. The essential oils present in rosemary also have astringent properties that help to constrict the pores, reducing the appearance of blackheads and whiteheads. Additionally, rosemary has natural antibacterial properties that combat acne-causing bacteria, leaving the skin looking clearer and healthier. Overall, using herbal rosemary capsules can lead to a more balanced and radiant complexion.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant Properties: Rosemary capsules contain antioxidants like rosmarinic acid and camphor, which help neutralize free radicals that can cause oxidative stress and inflammation in the skin, reducing the appearance of pores and controlling oil production.

Astringent and Tonic Properties: The astringent properties of rosemary help to tighten the skin's pores, reducing their size and minimizing the appearance of blackheads and whiteheads, while its tonic properties promote healthy blood circulation and lymphatic drainage, which can help reduce excess sebum production.

Anti-inflammatory Properties: Rosemary capsules contain anti-inflammatory compounds like camphor and borneol, which help to reduce redness and swelling associated with acne and other inflammatory skin conditions, promoting a more balanced and healthy-looking complexion.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rosemary roots contain anti-inflammatory compounds that can help reduce redness and inflammation in acne-prone skin, making them a great ingredient in medicinal capsules for oily face.
Buds: The buds of the rosemary plant are rich in antioxidants and have antiseptic properties, which can help soothe and calm oily skin, reducing the appearance of pores and preventing breakouts.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Thyme capsules helps with oily face because they contain antioxidants that help to reduce inflammation and purify the skin. The herbal extract in thyme capsules has a natural astringent property that helps to control sebum production, reducing excess oil on the surface of the skin. Additionally, thyme's antibacterial properties help to combat acne-causing bacteria, leaving the skin looking clearer and more balanced. Regular use of thyme capsules can lead to a smoother, healthier-looking complexion with reduced appearance of pores.
remedy_properties: Antimicrobial properties: Thyme's antimicrobial properties can help reduce bacteria on the skin, which can contribute to oily skin and acne, by inhibiting the growth of Propionibacterium acnes (P. acnes) bacteria.

Anti-inflammatory properties: Thyme's anti-inflammatory compounds, such as thymol and carvacrol, can help reduce redness, swelling, and irritation associated with oily skin and acne, while also soothing and calming the skin.

Antioxidant properties: Thyme's antioxidants can help protect the skin from environmental stressors and damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to an increase in oil production and lead to an oily complexion.
remedy_parts: Roots: Thyme roots have antibacterial properties that help reduce acne-causing bacteria on the skin, making them an effective ingredient in medicinal capsules for oily faces.
Leaves: Fresh or dried thyme leaves are rich in antioxidants and flavonoids that help soothe inflammation and calm redness associated with oily skin.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Oregano capsules helps with oily face because of their natural antiseptic and antibacterial properties. The herbs in these capsules have been known to reduce inflammation, purify the skin, and unclog pores, allowing for a healthy balance of sebum production. This leads to a reduction in excess oil secretion, resulting in a clearer complexion. Additionally, oregano's antioxidant properties help to soothe and calm the skin, reducing the appearance of pores and giving the face a smoother, more refined texture.
remedy_properties: Antibacterial properties: Oregano's antibacterial compounds, such as carvacrol, help to reduce acne-causing bacteria on the skin, reducing inflammation and preventing clogged pores.

Anti-inflammatory properties: The antioxidants in oregano, like thymol, have anti-inflammatory effects that help to soothe and calm the skin, reducing redness and irritation associated with oily skin.

Antifungal properties: Oregano's antifungal compounds can help to combat fungal infections that contribute to acne and oily skin, such as Malassezia folliculitis, by preventing the growth of fungi on the skin.
remedy_parts: Roots: Oregano roots have antifungal and antibacterial properties that help to reduce inflammation and acne-causing bacteria on the skin.
Buds: The buds of the oregano plant contain high amounts of antioxidants and flavonoids, which can help to soothe and calm irritated skin.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Peppermint capsules helps with oily face because they have natural astringent properties that help to tighten pores and reduce excess oil production. The menthol content in peppermint also has a cooling effect, which can help to constrict the sebaceous glands and decrease sebum secretion. Additionally, peppermint's antibacterial properties can help to combat acne-causing bacteria, further reducing inflammation and promoting a healthy, balanced complexion. Regular use of peppermint capsules may result in a more radiant and clear-looking skin.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory property: Peppermint oil's anti-inflammatory properties can help reduce redness and swelling associated with acne, allowing the skin to appear clearer and less inflamed.
Antimicrobial property: The antimicrobial compounds in peppermint oil can help combat bacterial overgrowth on the skin, reducing the production of excess sebum (oil) and preventing clogged pores.

Cooling and astringent property: Peppermint's cooling effect can help tighten pores and reduce the appearance of large pores, while its astringent properties can help absorb excess oil and reduce shine.
remedy_parts: Roots: Peppermint roots are used due to their high concentration of menthol, which helps to reduce sebum production and unclog pores, making them effective in treating oily skin.
Leaves: Fresh peppermint leaves contain rosmarinic acid, which has natural anti-inflammatory properties that help soothe and calm acne-prone skin.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Narrow-leaved paperbark capsules helps with oily face because it contains antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds that help to balance the skin's natural oil production. The capsules also have astringent properties, which can help to tighten pores and reduce the appearance of shine. Additionally, the herb has been shown to have antibacterial properties, which can help to control acne-causing bacteria and prevent breakouts. By using narrow-leaved paperbark capsules, individuals with oily skin may experience a reduction in oil production, a clearer complexion, and improved overall skin health.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Narrow-leaved paperbark capsules contain antioxidants that help neutralize free radicals, reducing inflammation and oxidative stress that can contribute to acne and oily skin.
Anti-inflammatory properties: The capsules' anti-inflammatory compounds can help reduce redness and swelling associated with oily skin, while also minimizing the appearance of pores and fine lines.

Astringent and toning properties: Narrow-leaved paperbark capsules have astringent and toning effects that can help tighten pores, balance oil production, and soothe the skin, leading to a more even-toned complexion.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds that help reduce sebum production and soothe irritated skin.
Barks: Contains flavonoids and phenolic acids that work as a natural astringent, reducing the appearance of pores and controlling oil secretion.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: English lavender capsules helps with oily face because of its remarkable ability to balance the skin's natural sebum production. Lavender oil, a key ingredient in these capsules, contains antifungal and antibacterial properties that help to reduce inflammation and purify the pores, thereby regulating oil secretion. This, in turn, reduces the appearance of pores and leaves the skin looking smoother, more even-toned, and less prone to excess oiliness, making it an effective natural solution for those struggling with oily skin concerns.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant property: Lavender's antioxidant property helps to reduce inflammation and oxidative stress, which can contribute to acne and excess oil production on the skin.
Anti-inflammatory property: Lavender's anti-inflammatory property reduces redness and swelling associated with acne and helps to unclog pores, leading to a reduction in oily appearance.

Antibacterial property: Lavender's antibacterial property prevents the growth of bacteria that can cause acne and reduce the amount of oil produced by the skin, resulting in a more balanced complexion.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, lavender roots help reduce inflammation and purify the skin.
Seeds: Containing essential oils and fatty acids, lavender seeds aid in balancing skin pH levels and regulating sebum production.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: St john's wort capsules helps with oily face because of its natural antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to reduce sebum production and alleviate acne symptoms. The herb has been shown to inhibit the activity of 5-alpha-reductase, an enzyme that converts testosterone to dihydrotestosterone (DHT), a hormone that contributes to oily skin. Additionally, St john's wort capsules may help to reduce stress and anxiety, common triggers for hormonal imbalances that can lead to excessive oil production on the face. As a result, taking St john's wort capsules regularly can help to regulate oil production and achieve a clearer, more balanced complexion.
remedy_properties: Hypotensive effect: St. John's Wort capsules have been shown to decrease blood pressure, which can help reduce the production of sebum oil, leading to a more balanced and less oily complexion.

Antioxidant activity: The antioxidants present in St. John's Wort capsules may help protect the skin from damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to inflammation and excess oil production, resulting in healthier-looking skin.

Anti-inflammatory properties: St. John's Wort's anti-inflammatory compounds may help reduce redness, swelling, and irritation associated with oily skin, promoting a more even-toned and clearer complexion.
remedy_parts: Roots: Containing high levels of hyperforin, roots help to reduce inflammation and prevent bacteria growth that can clog pores, leading to a clearer complexion.
Flowers: Rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, flowers have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help soothe acne-prone skin and reduce sebum production.
Barks: Containing tannins, barks have astringent and antibacterial properties that help to shrink pores, dry out pimples, and prevent future breakouts.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Pot marigold capsules helps with oily face because they contain calendula, a natural anti-inflammatory that reduces sebum production. The herb's antiseptic properties also help to control acne and prevent further breakouts. Additionally, the antioxidants present in pot marigold capsules combat free radicals, which can cause damage to the skin and lead to premature aging. By taking these capsules regularly, individuals with oily skin can enjoy a more balanced complexion, reduced shine, and improved overall skin health.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Pot Marigold capsules contain flavonoids and triterpenes that have anti-inflammatory effects, which can help reduce redness and swelling associated with oily skin.

Antioxidant properties: The capsules' antioxidant compounds can neutralize free radicals that contribute to skin damage and oxidative stress, which may exacerbate oily skin conditions such as acne and rosacea.

Soothing and calming effects: Pot Marigold has been shown to have a calming effect on the skin, reducing irritation and discomfort, which is particularly beneficial for individuals with sensitive or reactive skin prone to oiliness.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, which help to reduce redness and inflammation associated with oily skin.
Flowers: Contain flavonoids and triterpenes, which have antibacterial and antifungal properties, making them effective against acne-causing bacteria and fungi.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: White tea capsules helps with oily face because they contain potent antioxidants that help to regulate sebum production, reducing excess oil secretion. The natural astringent properties of white tea also help to tighten pores and purify the skin, allowing it to breathe freely and absorb fewer impurities. Additionally, white tea's anti-inflammatory effects soothe and calm irritated skin, reducing redness and promoting a more balanced complexion. By incorporating herbal white tea capsules into your daily routine, you can say goodbye to an oily complexion and hello to healthy, radiant-looking skin.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: White tea contains powerful anti-inflammatory compounds like catechins, which can reduce inflammation and redness associated with oily skin, helping to calm and soothe the complexion.

Antioxidant properties: The high antioxidant content of white tea helps to neutralize free radicals that can cause oxidative stress and damage to the skin, leading to a reduction in sebum production and a more balanced oil flow.

Astringent and antibacterial properties: White tea's tannins and other compounds have astringent and antibacterial effects, which can help to dry out and reduce the appearance of pores, while also combating acne-causing bacteria that contribute to oily skin.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and flavonoids, white tea roots help reduce inflammation and regulate sebum production to control oiliness on the skin.
Seeds: Containing essential fatty acids and amino acids, white tea seeds nourish and moisturize the skin, reducing acne and blackhead formation.
